text:
> >Number:         16005
> >Category:       bin
> >Synopsis:       add new option to date(1)

It doesn't seem to work as advertised.

$ date -V99y -V12m -V31d -V12H -V0M -V0S -V-1m
Wed Dec  1 12:00:00 GMT 1999
